untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of a Broadening Wedge pattern with specific trend line geometry (diverging upper and lower trend lines), identification of a partial rise that fails to touch the upper trend line, and confirmation of a downward breakout. These pattern recognition elements require trend line calculation and multi-bar pattern matching that cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time price indicators and moving averages. The allowed indicators lack: (1) trend line detection capability, (2) support/resistance level identification relative to a specific pattern, (3) pattern formation state tracking across multiple bars with geometric constraints.
translation_notes: While a downward breakout can be crudely approximated with close < prev_close and exit on close > prev_high, this does not capture the essential Broadening Wedge pattern structure: the diverging trend lines, the touch of the lower line, the partial climb toward the upper line without touching it, or the reversal preceding the breakout. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic external to this rules engine.
